sql_array: CREATE TABLE test_types (id INT PRIMARY KEY, name VARCHAR(255), created_at TIMESTAMP DEFAULT CURRENT_TIMESTAMP);
INSERT INTO test_types (id, name) VALUES (1, 'Alice'), (2, 'Bob'), (3, NULL);
CREATE TABLE test_classes (class_id INT PRIMARY KEY, class_name VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_classes (class_id, class_name) VALUES (1, 'ClassA'), (2, 'ClassB');
SELECT dbg_obj_print((SELECT name FROM test_types WHERE id = 2)) WHERE 1 = (SELECT COUNT(*) FROM test_classes WHERE class_name = 'ClassB');
SELECT * FROM test_types WHERE id IN (SELECT id FROM test_types WHERE name IS NOT NULL);
SELECT class_name, COUNT(*) as name_count FROM test_classes GROUP BY class_name HAVING name_count > 0;
SELECT dbg_obj_print(name) FROM test_types WHERE name = 'Alice' AND created_at >= NOW() - INTERVAL '1 DAY';
SELECT a.class_name FROM test_classes a JOIN (SELECT id, name FROM test_types WHERE id = 1) b ON a.class_id = b.id;
SELECT dbg_obj_print(name) FROM test_types WHERE COALESCE(name, 'Unknown') = 'Unknown' OR id = 3;
INSERT INTO test_types (id, name) VALUES (4, 'Charlie'), (5, NULL);
SELECT dbg_obj_print((SELECT name FROM test_types WHERE id = 5)) AS null_example WHERE id IS NULL;
CREATE TABLE test_details (detail_id INT PRIMARY KEY, test_type_id INT REFERENCES test_types(id), extra_info VARCHAR(255));
INSERT INTO test_details (detail_id, test_type_id, extra_info) VALUES (1, 1, 'Extra Info 1'), (2, 2, '');
SELECT dbg_obj_print(name) FROM test_types WHERE name LIKE '%' || (SELECT extra_info FROM test_details WHERE detail_id = 1) || '%';
SELECT a.*, b.extra_info FROM test_types a LEFT JOIN test_details b ON a.id = b.test_type_id WHERE b.extra_info NOT LIKE '';
SELECT dbg_obj_print(COALESCE(b.extra_info, 'No Info')) FROM test_types a LEFT JOIN test_details b ON a.id = b.test_type_id WHERE a.name IS NOT NULL;
CREATE TEMPORARY TABLE temp_test (col1 NUMERIC, col2 VARCHAR(20));
INSERT INTO temp_test (col1, col2) VALUES (1.5, 'Sample'), (2.3, 'Test'), (NULL, 'NULL Test');
SELECT dbg_obj_print(CAST(col1 AS VARCHAR)) FROM temp_test WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL ORDER BY col1 DESC;
SELECT db_obj_print((SELECT col2 FROM temp_test WHERE col1 IS NOT NULL)) WHERE EXISTS(SELECT 1 FROM test_types WHERE id < 10);
